창세기 7:1.content: Yahweh said to Noah, “Come with all of your household into the ship, for I have seen your righteousness before me in this generation.

창세기 7:2.content: You shall take seven pairs of every clean animal with you, the male and his female. Of the animals that are not clean, take two, the male and his female.

창세기 7:3.content: Also of the birds of the sky, seven and seven, male and female, to keep seed alive on the surface of all the earth.

창세기 7:4.content: In seven days, I will cause it to rain on the earth for forty days and forty nights. I will destroy every living thing that I have made from the surface of the ground.”

창세기 7:5.content: Noah did everything that Yahweh commanded him.

창세기 7:6.content: Noah was six hundred years old when the flood of waters came on the earth.

창세기 7:7.content: Noah went into the ship with his sons, his wife, and his sons’ wives, because of the floodwaters.

창세기 7:8.content: Clean animals, unclean animals, birds, and everything that creeps on the ground

창세기 7:9.content: went by pairs to Noah into the ship, male and female, as God commanded Noah.

창세기 7:10.content: After the seven days, the floodwaters came on the earth.

창세기 7:11.content: In the six hundredth year of Noah’s life, in the second month, on the seventeenth day of the month, on that day all the fountains of the great deep burst open, and the sky’s windows opened.

창세기 7:12.content: It rained on the earth forty days and forty nights.

창세기 7:13.content: In the same day Noah, and Shem, Ham, and Japheth—the sons of Noah—and Noah’s wife and the three wives of his sons with them, entered into the ship—

창세기 7:14.content: they, and every animal after its kind, all the livestock after their kind, every creeping thing that creeps on the earth after its kind, and every bird after its kind, every bird of every sort.

창세기 7:15.content: Pairs from all flesh with the breath of life in them went into the ship to Noah.

창세기 7:16.content: Those who went in, went in male and female of all flesh, as God commanded him; then Yahweh shut him in.

창세기 7:17.content: The flood was forty days on the earth. The waters increased, and lifted up the ship, and it was lifted up above the earth.

창세기 7:18.content: The waters rose, and increased greatly on the earth; and the ship floated on the surface of the waters.

창세기 7:19.content: The waters rose very high on the earth. All the high mountains that were under the whole sky were covered.

창세기 7:20.content: The waters rose fifteen cubits higher, and the mountains were covered.

창세기 7:21.content: All flesh died that moved on the earth, including birds, livestock, animals, every creeping thing that creeps on the earth, and every man.

창세기 7:22.content: All on the dry land, in whose nostrils was the breath of the spirit of life, died.

창세기 7:23.content: Every living thing was destroyed that was on the surface of the ground, including man, livestock, creeping things, and birds of the sky. They were destroyed from the earth. Only Noah was left, and those who were with him in the ship.

창세기 7:24.content: The waters flooded the earth one hundred fifty days.
